findings.evidence: `rg -n "mutually inverse|ofComplexModule_complexModule|complexModule_ofComplexModule"` finds the mutual-inverse claims at lines 22 and 145 and only the one-sided theorem `ofComplexModule_complexModule` at line 146.
findings.fix: Either weaken the wording to say only that reading back the induced module recovers `J`, or add/document the missing converse theorem if that is intended.
findings.issue: The module docstring says the two constructions are mutually inverse, and the theorem doc repeats this at line 145, but the file only proves `ofComplexModule_complexModule`; there is no opposite round-trip theorem recovering an arbitrary existing `Module ℂ V` action.

summary: The added file has module and declaration docs, but the documentation overstates the API by claiming a two-sided inverse correspondence that the file only provides in one direction.
